div.p: Transition Mechanism: IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses are used by the IPv6 application layer to communicate with IPv4-only nodes. The kernel handles the translation to standard IPv4 packets on the wire.

g.text: b0_hdr, b1_hdr, b2_hdr, b3_hdr, b4_hdr, b5_hdr, b6_hdr, b7_hdr, b8_hdr, b9_hdr, bA_hdr, bB_hdr, bC_hdr, bD_hdr, bE_hdr, bF_hdr
